---
slug: welcome
title: Welcome to the blog
# Pick any date: this controls the post's publish date / archive bucket / RSS
# ordering. Docusaurus also accepts a date-prefixed filename (e.g.
# `2025-04-24-welcome.md`) instead of setting `date` here.
date: 2025-04-24
authors:
  - bndy
tags:
  - welcome
---

This is your first blog post. It lives at `blog/welcome.md` and is powered by
`@docusaurus/plugin-content-blog`.

Anything above the `<!-- truncate -->` marker shows on the blog index; the
rest only renders on the post's detail page.

<!-- truncate -->

## Next steps

- Add more posts under `blog/`. You can name files either `any-slug.md` (with
  `date:` in frontmatter) or `YYYY-MM-DD-any-slug.md` (date inferred from the
  filename).
- Edit author profiles in `blog/authors.yml`.
- To disable the blog entirely, set `blog: false` in `docs.config.js`, delete
  this directory, and drop the Blog entry from `nav`.
